description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a smooth, glossy finish and a cylindrical shape. The exterior is adorned with a striking black silhouette of tall, leafless trees, creating a bold contrast against the white background. The cup features a single, rounded handle that is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The rim is slightly flared, and the interior is plain white, matching the exterior base color. The decorative tree motif wraps partially around the cup, giving it a modern and artistic appearance. There are no visible logos, branding, or text on the surface.
description: A white ceramic cup with a glossy finish, featuring a black tree silhouette design and a rounded handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main section of the black tree silhouette on the white cup body, with no handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the tree motif, with the handle not visible and the rim clearly defined.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying both the tree design and the rounded handle on the right side of the cup.
description_view_3: View focused on the handle and the tree motif, with the handle prominently visible on the left.
